tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate asked me to do their part because I'm better, but my energy is low and stress is high. I'll finish my own share now to avoid friction.

desires: Complete my own project share before the deadline to avoid any appearance of unreliability, even though I am already at 100%.
Avoid triggering a conflict with teammate_A by silently absorbing their unassigned task without raising expectations or asking for help.

goals.description: Finalize and submit my own project share to close the loop on the deadline.
goals.rationale: My value system weights academic reliability above social niceties. Even though I am already at 100%, submitting now prevents any appearance of unreliability, which is critical for my long-term standing with prof_assignment. The 'soft' hardness means this won't drain excessive energy, so it fits within my current focus_capacity.

goals.description: Silently absorb teammate_A's unassigned task without verbal confirmation or complaint.
goals.rationale: I am avoidant in conflict; acknowledging their offer or asking for help would trigger interpersonal friction. By absorbing the work silently, I maintain the trust level with teammate_A while avoiding the stress of negotiation. This aligns with my deliberate time horizon—I will complete this later to ensure quality without immediate pressure.
